chunks.text:
Pinnacle Foundation Repair — Foundation repair in Grand Prairie and DFW. Services:
- Foundation repair
- Pier installation
- Foundation inspection
- Drainage correction
- Concrete leveling

Contact Information:

- Email: saoffice@pinnaclefoundationrepair. com
- Address: 601 Dickey Rd, Grand Prairie, TX 75051
- Website: https://pinnaclefoundationrepair. com/
- Service Area: Grand Prairie, TX and DFW area

Rating: 5 stars with 2400 reviews.
